---
title: "The CoopGame Package"
short-title: "CoopGame"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Coalition formation, visualization, and large cooperative games in R."
keywords: ["CoopGame", "coalition", "cooperative games", "R package"]
---

# The CoopGame Package {#sec-coopgame-package}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
